description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-link` (T1-05) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-link/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, href/target/rel props typed, variant type (inline/standalone)
2. Accessibility — semantic `<a>` element, opens-in-new-tab warning (icon + sr-only text), keyboard accessible, no suppressed focus, axe-core pass
3. Tests — internal/external link variants, disabled state, visited state, download attr, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — inline and standalone variants, external link demo
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, underline behavior, visited/hover/focus states, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB (should be tiny)
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-link/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-link — T1-05 antagonistic quality review
